title: polypodium semicryptum
intro: Polypodium semicryptum, also known as the Chinese polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium semicryptum include the potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its use in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. Polypodium semicryptum is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
